reason: I have 1 Skill Point available. Unlocking 'pe_cot' (Chain-of-thought) will improve the quality and accuracy of my reasoning for future questions, which is a high-value investment early in the game.

Unlocking 'pe_plan' (Plan+Reflect) is a strategic priority. It adds a structured planning phase and a reflection phase to each answer call, which significantly increases accuracy and reduces the risk of HP loss. Since I am close to the next SP threshold (4/7 XP), ensuring I get the next few questions correct is vital for momentum.

I have 1 Skill Point available. Unlocking 'pe_reflect' provides a dedicated reflection step after my initial answer, which significantly increases the probability of accuracy and protects my HP while ensuring XP gain. This is a high-value strategic investment before tackling higher-level doors.

I have 1 SP and this is the only skill currently available to unlock. Unlocking it now provides better context for future chambers, and I anticipate gaining more XP soon to reach the next SP threshold.
